name: foodmirror
description: FoodMirror — поведенческий инструмент: фото еды → короткий инсайт → микро-коррекция

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/api & npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run dev --workspace=apps/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run dev --workspace=apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && tsc --noEmit --project apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --project apps/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run build && npm run test:api && npm run test:web && npm run test:smoke
